title: MPTE Frontend Bundle + React Hook API Layer — XSS Hardening & Live Wiring
description: The community clusters the MPTE minified bundle (index-B8aPzWeF.js), the use-api.ts React hook, and api/client.ts. An xss_exploit_test.mjs confirms an XSS payload test exists. The UI hook layer is partially wired but the MPTE report creation flow (step1→step4) does not sanitize report file paths before rendering, and the professional UI injection (buildUI) has no CSP nonce.
missing: Add DOMPurify sanitization to all report content rendered via innerHTML in the MPTE UI bundle; enforce strict CSP nonce on dynamic script injection
Wire use-api.ts hooks to real MPTE endpoints (/api/v1/mpte/scan, /api/v1/mpte/reports) replacing the current hardcoded mock responses
Add E2E Playwright test covering the XSS exploit test scenario to CI so payload reflection is caught as a regression before each release
